case_title: JAVIER CRUZ VS. DONG MIRG LI

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CRUZ, JAVIER ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-18-2015 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LI, DONG MIRG

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-18-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-18-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---CANDELARIO REBOLLEDO. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---YISHI LI. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CRUZ, JAVIER AS TO DEFENDANT LI, DONG MIRG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-18-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES NONE LISTED. SERVED OCT-26-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LI, DONG MIRG

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CRUZ, JAVIER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LI, DONG MIRG $7,125.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,125.00, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,000.00 AN AMOUNT WHICH HAS ALREADY BEEN PAID TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
